articles.title: The oil price crunch is looming
articles.body: The longer the Strait of Hormuz blockade continues, the more likely a crisis-like adjustment in rich economies becomes

articles.body: As US equities hit fresh highs, strategists warn that investors are downplaying the impact of soaring oil prices.
